title: Bytedance's open-weight Helios model brings minute-long AI video generation close to real time
summary: Bytedance researchers say Helios is the first 14-billion-parameter video model to hit 19.5 FPS on a single GPU while generating minute-long clips. Code and weights are publicly available. The article Bytedance's open-weight Helios model brings minute-long AI video generation close to real time appeared first on The Decoder.

title: Anthropic's Claude AI uncovers over 100 security vulnerabilities in Firefox
summary: Anthropic's AI model Claude has found over 100 bugs in Firefox, including vulnerabilities that decades of testing had missed. The article Anthropic's Claude AI uncovers over 100 security vulnerabilities in Firefox appeared first on The Decoder.

summary: arXiv:2603.04631v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly integrated into critical decision-making pipelines, a trend that raises the demand for robust and automated data analysis. title: K-Gen: A Multimodal Language-Conditioned Approach for Interpretable Keypoint-Guided Trajectory Generation
summary: arXiv:2603.04868v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Generating realistic and diverse trajectories is a critical challenge in autonomous driving simulation.
